reasoning: VIX at 16.41 in MID regime with flat direction — neither bullish nor bearish from VIX alone. No macro events scheduled for today (2026-06-19) in the calendar; last events were FOMC/Retail Sales on 06-17 and PCE on 06-25. Overnight gap is significant at +$5.96 (up from prior close 740.96), indicating strong bullish overnight sentiment. However, rotation_signal shows 'risk_off' which contradicts the gap-up — this suggests the overnight enthusiasm may be fading as regular trading begins. The gap-up is substantial but the risk-off signal creates uncertainty about sustainability.
